sn48.44:1.2: that on one occasion the Blessed One was staying near Sāvatthī at the Eastern Gatehouse.
sn48.44:1.4: “Sāriputta, do you take it on conviction
sn48.44:1.5: that the faculty of conviction, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation? Do you take it on conviction that the faculty of persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation?”
sn48.44:2.1: “Lord, it’s not that I take it on conviction in the Blessed One
sn48.44:2.2: that the faculty of conviction… persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation.
sn48.44:2.3: Those who have not known, seen, penetrated, realized, or attained it by means of discernment would have to take it on conviction in others
sn48.44:2.4: that the faculty of conviction… persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation;
sn48.44:2.5: whereas those who have known, seen, penetrated, realized, & attained it by means of discernment would have no doubt or uncertainty
sn48.44:2.6: that the faculty of conviction… persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation.
sn48.44:2.7: And as for me, I have known, seen, penetrated, realized, & attained it by means of discernment.
sn48.44:2.8: I have no doubt or uncertainty that the faculty of conviction… persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation.”
sn48.44:3.2: Those who have not known, seen, penetrated, realized, or attained it by means of discernment would have to take it on conviction in others
sn48.44:3.3: that the faculty of conviction… persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation;
sn48.44:3.4: whereas those who have known, seen, penetrated, realized, & attained it by means of discernment would have no doubt or uncertainty
sn48.44:3.5: that the faculty of conviction… persistence… mindfulness… concentration… discernment, when developed & pursued, gains a footing in the deathless, has the deathless as its final end & consummation.”
